form.formComment: Improved sharply when third behind Bernie Lou at Ascot Park last start over 390m (23.11). Speedy conveyance who looks hard to beat.

form.formComment: Good effort at double-figure odds last time when third (17.72) over 295m at this track. Drawn close to the inside. Heading in the right direction and well placed to be very competitive.

form.formComment: Quickly away at this track two runs back then again settled forward and finished second at this track last start over 295m. Leading player.

form.formComment: Has finished fifth at her last couple of starts, most recently at this track over 295m. Other runners look much more appealing.

form.formComment: Last start finished fifth over 295m at this track, beaten 4 lengths (17.45) behind Impressive Nora in a Class 2 on April 10. Thereabouts last start but looks tested this time.

form.formComment: Was prominent from the outset and held on well to win at this track over 295m in 17.26 last start, beating Foxy Thomas. Winner last time and looks well placed again. Place claims.

formComments.comment: Was prominent from the outset and held on well to win at this track over 295m in 17.26 last start, beating Foxy Thomas. Winner last time and looks well placed again. Place claims.

form.formComment: Well supported here last start but failed to deliver, finishing finished last in a Class 2 on April 10 over 295m at this track behind Mitcham Eric beaten 10 lengths (17.83). Placed two back at this track. Has clocked an exceptional 17.05 Best Time here at the trip. Expected to feature.

form.formComment: At the last outing finished 5th over 295m at this track beaten 6 lengths (17.58) behind Opawa Izzy in a Class 2 on March 30. Major threat on best form.

form.formComment: Did a good job two starts back at this track to win by 0.7 lengths in 17.43, beating Diaz. Last start finished last over 295m at this track beaten 10 lengths (17.91) behind Homebush Harold in a Class 2 on March 27. Not keen, needs to lift.
